title: Vs Hows Going
sourceTitle: Vs Midjourney V8 1 Hows Going Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt:
A half-body shot of a single young woman leaning forward across a bar counter in a lively low-lit Tokyo bar at night, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. She is mid-conversation — body angled toward the bartender across the counter, laughing or saying something just loud enough to be heard over the music, unaware of the camera.
East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners, animated and bright in the moment. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige (NC10–NC20), smooth and even. Skin subsurface scattering visible under warm directional bar light, specular micro-highlights on her collarbone, shoulders, and cheekbones, fine foundation powder grain perceptible at close range.
She wears a strappy black satin camisole with a low neckline, lightweight and form-fitting — cool for the warm bar air. Thin spaghetti straps catch the neon light. She leans one forearm flat on the counter, the other hand loosely holding a tall cocktail glass with a citrus garnish. Two or three stray hairs fall loose across her neck and bare shoulder, displaced by faint air movement, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical. A blurred male bartender in a white shirt is visible across the counter, creating depth and interaction.
Mixed artificial light sources — warm amber bar backlighting illuminates the spirit bottles behind, a vivid pink-to-purple neon strip along the bar edge casts a soft cool glow across her forearm and collarbone. The atmosphere is spontaneous and alive — mid-laugh energy, unguarded natural expression. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 2:3. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.
